output_summary: Acknowledged user-command, detected Refactor Mode (jira-task.md empty). Awaiting workflow command to start execution.
jira-task.md empty — treated as INVALID; switching to Refactor Mode. user-command.md will be authoritative.
Confirmed Refactor Mode, will not modify protected areas, will NOT install new dependencies, will only change files listed in user-command.md after workflow command.
Added gift.service.ts in packages/shared and updated use-gifts.hook.ts to use the shared service. Did not add dependencies. LSP warning noted for import path.
Checked for protected-area modifications: none. Noted LSP import resolution warning in use-gifts.hook.ts; not blocking. No tests run. Recommend running full build in CI.
Proceed with changes as implemented. No protected files modified. Do not commit. Notify user about LSP warning and next steps.
Exported gift.service from package entrypoint so consumers can import from '@wh-label/shared'. Updated hook to use package export and adapted refetch signature.
Implemented withdrawal bank-transfer UI by adapting deposit bank-transfer components (form + qr) and wired react-hook-form + zod. User reports this does not match Figma design.
Workflow initiated - Figma implementation in web-shell/bank-transfer.tsx
Figma design analyzed: Bank Transfer Withdrawal with Add Bank Account button, note section. Existing component uses deposit pattern, needs refactor for withdrawal UX
Discovered: shadcn UI components, react-hook-form+zod+react-query patterns, Tailwind CSS, lucide-react icons, @tolgee i18n, @wh-label/ui library, accordion pattern
APPROVED: Refactor bank-transfer.tsx to match Figma withdrawal UI. No new dependencies. Keep accordion pattern. Replace complex form with simple Add Bank Account button.
Refactored bank-transfer.tsx: Removed complex form/QR code logic, added simple Add Bank Account button UI matching Figma design. No new dependencies.
APPROVED: All guardrails and coding standards followed. No violations. Warning: 7 translation keys need to be added. Button handler is TODO placeholder.
SUCCESS: Bank transfer withdrawal UI implemented per Figma design. All agents completed successfully. No violations. Ready for translation key addition and button handler implementation.
NEW TASK: Implement Add Bank Account dialog/modal with form when button clicked. Two Figma designs to implement.
Two Figma designs analyzed: 1) Dialog header with back arrow + title, 2) Form with bank account input, file upload, submit button. Need Dialog/Sheet component.
Found Dialog component, Input component with file upload support. All UI components exist. No new dependencies needed.
APPROVED: Create new AddBankAccountDialog component. Use Dialog from @wh-label/ui. Implement form with react-hook-form+zod. Add file upload. Update bank-transfer.tsx to trigger dialog.
Created AddBankAccountDialog component with form validation, file upload. Updated bank-transfer.tsx to open dialog. Used existing UI components only.
APPROVED: All standards met. 1 new file, 1 modified. No new dependencies. React-hook-form+zod implemented. Warning: 11 translation keys needed.
SUCCESS: Add Bank Account dialog implemented with form validation and file upload. All agents completed. No violations. Ready for translation keys and API integration.
NEW TASK: When submit-verification clicked, set VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS step and show new design in bank-transfer.tsx. State management needed.
Figma design analyzed: Success message with CircleCheck icon, green text, separator, description text. Current state management exists with STEPS. Need to add VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS step.
APPROVED: Pass onVerificationSubmit callback to AddBankAccountDialog. Add VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS UI block with CircleCheck icon and green success message. No new dependencies.
Added onVerificationSubmit callback to AddBankAccountDialog. Implemented VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS UI with CircleCheck icon and green success message. No new dependencies.
APPROVED: All standards met. 2 files modified, no new files. CircleCheck icon from existing lucide-react. Warning: 2 translation keys needed.
SUCCESS: VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS step implemented with CircleCheck icon and success message. State transitions working. All agents completed. No violations.
NEW TASK: Create withdrawal-with-bank-accounts.tsx component at specific path. Implement Figma design. Use react-query, zod, react-hook-form.

Figma design analyzed: Withdrawal form with amount input (USD suffix), bank account select dropdown, Confirm button (disabled state), Add Bank Account button, note section. Two-column layout for amount and bank account.
Found Select component usage patterns. All UI components exist. Controller pattern for Select from react-hook-form. No new dependencies needed.

APPROVED: Implement WithdrawalWithBankAccounts with form validation. Two-column layout. Input with USD suffix. Select dropdown for bank accounts. Confirm button and Add Bank Account button. No new dependencies.
